description_long: This is an adult female pedestrian with a slender build, standing upright with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. She has long, straight hair that falls past her shoulders and is styled with a center part. She is dressed in a strapless, form-fitting leather jumpsuit with a visible belt and high-waisted pants, giving her a modern, urban look. The outfit is completed with tall, heeled boots that reach just below the knees, and the material of the clothing appears sleek and glossy. Her facial features are defined, and she is not carrying any visible accessories or objects. The overall appearance suggests a fashionable individual suited for a city or nightlife environment.
description: A fashionable adult woman in a strapless, form-fitting leather jumpsuit and tall heeled boots, standing upright with arms outstretched. She has long, straight hair and a modern urban style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the strapless jumpsuit, belt, and defined facial features with arms extended.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the contour of the jumpsuit, and the heeled boots.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the jumpsuit, the long straight hair, and the fit of the pants and boots.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, the arm extended, and the side seam details of the outfit.
attribute_clothing_type: strapless form-fitting leather jumpsuit with a belt and tall heeled boots
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: long straight hair with a center part
